narrative:
Archbold One (precinct in Fulton County) has 1,172 registered voters, with 52.2% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 39.9% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 7.8%, a pronounced Republican lean of 32.1 percentage points.
